name: Image Sidecar Plugin
_comment_version: You dont need to update this field
description: Detects when an image or pdf is added and automatically creates a sidecar file in the same directory. Scans for pdf, jpg, png, gif, webp, tiff, bmp formats

scripts.release: npm run build && shx rm -rf release/image_sidecar_for_obsidian && shx mkdir release/image_sidecar_for_obsidian && shx cp manifest.json main.js release/image_sidecar_for_obsidian/ && (shx test -f styles.css && shx cp styles.css release/image_sidecar_for_obsidian/ || shx echo 'no styles')
scripts.deploy: npm run release/image_sidecar_for_obsidian && shx cp -r release/image_sidecar_for_obsidian/* "$PLUGIN_DIR"
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
